chapter_title.en: Chapter on Whose Testimony Must Be Rejected and Whose Testimony Must Be Accepted

text: 3289 - وَ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَنْ شَهِدَ عِنْدَنَا بِشَهَادَةٍ ثُمَّ غَيَّرَ أَخَذْنَا بِالْأُولَى وَ طَرَحْنَا اَلْأُخْرَى".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3289 - And the Prophet, may Allah (swt) bless him and his family, said:
"Whoever testifies before us with a testimony and then changes it, we will accept the first (testimony) and discard the second (testimony)."
